data.title: Polymarket Account Makes $340,000 Bet on Philadelphia 76ers
data.description: A Polymarket account, which has accumulated over $1.5 million in profit, placed a $340,000 wager on the Philadelphia 76ers to defeat the Minnesota Timberwolves. According to NS3.AI, the Odaily Seer Channel identified this trade after the game had commenced and progressed into the second quarter.

data.title: SpaceX targets an IPO valuation of over $2 trillion, planning to raise up to $75 billion.
data.description: SpaceX has raised its IPO valuation target to over $2 trillion as it prepares to market what could be the largest IPO in history to potential investors. SpaceX's valuation is expected to grow by nearly two-thirds within months. In February, SpaceX acquired Elon Musk's xAI, valuing the combined company at $1.25 trillion. A listing with a valuation exceeding $2 trillion would give SpaceX a market capitalization exceeding all companies in the S&P 500 except Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon, as well as Meta and Tesla. SpaceX has secretly filed for an IPO, with the listing potentially taking place as early as June, and is expected to raise up to $75 billion, far surpassing the previous record of $29 billion set by Saudi Aramco in 2019. The funds raised will be used for space-based AI data centers and lunar factory projects. SpaceX has selected Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley as lead underwriters for its IPO and plans to hold a conference call with the banking syndicate next Monday, followed by an analyst briefing later in April. Bloomberg Intelligence analysts point out that SpaceX's revenue is projected to reach nearly $20 billion by 2026, with launch operations and Starlink contributing the majority of that revenue.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on 76ers vs. Timberwolves NBA Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the NBA regular season game between the Philadelphia 76ers and the Minnesota Timberwolves. According to Odaily, an account with over $1.5 million in profits has invested $340,000 on the 76ers to win, with an average opening price of 6035¢.

The game, which started at 7 a.m. UTC+8, is currently in the second quarter. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the 76ers hold a record of 42 wins and 34 losses, placing them sixth in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Timberwolves have a record of 46 wins and 30 losses, ranking sixth in the Western Conference.

data.title: Jack Dorsey Suggests Return of Bitcoin Faucet, Sparking Renewed Interest
data.description: Jack Dorsey has suggested the potential return of a Bitcoin faucet, a tool that distributes small amounts of BTC to users for completing simple tasks. According to NS3.AI, this announcement has reignited interest in the concept, although Block has yet to reveal details regarding the distribution size, usage limits, or whether the payouts will utilize the Lightning Network.

data.title: An account with over $1.5 million in profits purchased $340,000 worth of NBA regular season game footage showing the 76ers defeating the Timberwolves.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0xbddf61af533ff524d27154e589d2d7a81510c684) that profited over $1.5 million in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season 76ers vs. Timberwolves" prediction event purchased $340,000 worth of shares in favor of the 76ers to defeat the Timberwolves, with an average opening price of 6035¢. The NBA regular season 76ers vs. Timberwolves game started at 7:00 AM Beijing time today, and the game is currently in the second quarter. The NBA regular season is now nearing its end. The 76ers have a record of 42 wins and 34 losses, ranking 6th in the Eastern Conference; the Timberwolves have a record of 46 wins and 30 losses, ranking 6th in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are priced in.

data.title: LastPass US Agrees to $8.2 Million Settlement Over 2022 Data Breach
data.description: LastPass US has reached a proposed class action settlement to address the fallout from its 2022 data breach. According to NS3.AI, the settlement involves an $8.2 million fund to compensate affected users. Eligible claimants can receive up to $10,000 for documented extraordinary losses. Claim forms must be submitted by July 2, 2026, with a final approval hearing scheduled for July 14, 2026.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Crypto flows fell to $11 billion in Q1, only one-third of last year's figure.
data.description: JPMorgan analysis indicates that digital asset inflows in the first quarter of 2026 were approximately $11 billion, only about one-third of the same period last year, indicating a significant slowdown in market momentum. At the current annualized pace, full-year inflows would be around $44 billion, far below the historical high of approximately $130 billion in 2025. In terms of fund structure, the main sources of inflows this quarter were corporate balance sheet allocations (especially continued Bitcoin purchases by companies like Strategy) and crypto venture capital funds, while participation from traditional investors (including institutions and retail investors) declined significantly. Furthermore, weakening CME Bitcoin futures positions reflect a shift in institutional demand towards negative sentiment; spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs experienced outflows in January, although some inflows returned in March, but the overall trend remains weak. The analysis suggests that the current market exhibits a structural characteristic of being "dominated by a few large funds," rather than a broad-based return of funds.

data.title: HypurrFi is suspected of domain hijacking; users are urgently advised to suspend its use.
data.description: DeFi lending protocol HypurrFi issued a security warning stating that its website domain has been compromised and that it is investigating a potential domain hijacking incident. The project explicitly stated, "Do not use the hypurr.fi domain," and advised users to avoid interacting with the platform until further notice. The team also emphasized that user funds are currently safe and official social media accounts remain under control. HypurrFi runs on HyperEVM and has a total locked value of approximately $30 million. Analysis indicates that domain hijacking is a common attack method in the crypto industry. Attackers typically inject malicious code or wallet-stealing programs by controlling the front-end page. Even if the underlying smart contracts themselves are secure, users may still face asset risks.

data.title: Cosmos ecosystem's Leap Wallet has announced its closure and will be completely taken offline on May 28th.
data.description: Leap Wallet, a non-custodial wallet within the Cosmos ecosystem, has announced it will cease operations, with a planned shutdown of all its products and services on May 28th. The shutdown will affect its browser plugin, iOS and Android mobile applications, web application, Swapfast trading functionality, and Cosmos Hub validator node service. Leap was initially launched in 2021 with funding from Terraform Labs, and later transitioned to a multi-chain wallet after the collapse of the Terra ecosystem, supporting over 100 blockchain networks. The team advises users who have already delegated ATOM to Leap's validator nodes to re-delegate to other nodes as soon as possible to avoid interruptions in staking rewards and to consider the impact of unbinding cycles. The project team stated that despite the product closure, they remain optimistic about the long-term development of the crypto industry and the cross-chain ecosystem.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Nears 70,000 ETH Staking Goal with Recent Addition
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has staked over 45,000 ETH, valued at more than $92.2 million, as of Friday. According to NS3.AI, this move brings the foundation's total staked ETH to approximately 69,500, leaving it less than 500 ETH short of its 70,000 ETH target. Arkham Intelligence data highlights that the foundation initiated staking in February as part of a treasury strategy aimed at utilizing yield to support protocol research, development, and ecosystem grants.

data.title: Charles Schwab Plans Limited Rollout of Spot Bitcoin and Ethereum Trading in 2026
data.description: Charles Schwab has announced its intention to introduce spot Bitcoin and Ethereum trading in the first half of 2026. According to NS3.AI, the firm, which manages $12.2 trillion in assets, will initially offer the service with a limited rollout in the second quarter before expanding further. CEO Rick Wurster confirmed that the trading service will be available to U.S. residents, excluding those in New York and Louisiana.

data.title: FIFA Partners with ADI Predictstreet for 2026 World Cup Prediction Market
data.description: FIFA has announced ADI Predictstreet as its inaugural official prediction market partner for the 2026 World Cup. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration will allow fans to predict match outcomes and tournament statistics by utilizing historical data from FIFA. The 2026 World Cup will feature 104 matches across 16 host cities, providing a comprehensive platform for fan engagement through predictive analytics.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Whale Alert has reported the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury. This development is significant as it may impact the liquidity and market dynamics of the stablecoin sector. The minting of new USDC tokens could influence trading volumes and investor sentiment in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Expert Predicts Bitcoin Decline Amid Iran Conflict Impact on Oil Prices
data.description: Former hedge fund manager James Lavish has expressed concerns that Bitcoin may experience a further decline of 10%–20% if the ongoing conflict in Iran continues to exert pressure on oil prices. According to NS3.AI, Lavish highlighted that a prolonged conflict could lead to a new inflation shock, revive fears of stagflation, and necessitate a broader repricing across global markets.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | CFTC Reports Changes in COMEX Gold and Silver Positions
data.description: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has released data indicating shifts in speculative positions for COMEX gold and silver as of the week ending March 31. According to Jin10, the net long positions for COMEX gold increased by 1,098 contracts, reaching a total of 93,872 contracts. In contrast, COMEX silver saw a reduction in net long positions by 99 contracts, bringing the total to 10,816 contracts.

data.title: HypurrFi Investigates Potential Domain Hijacking, Advises Users to Avoid Website and App
data.description: HypurrFi has issued a warning to its users, advising them to refrain from using its website or lending application due to an ongoing investigation into a potential domain hijacking. According to NS3.AI, the protocol currently holds approximately $30 million in total value locked. Despite the investigation, the team has assured users that there is no immediate risk to their funds. Additionally, HypurrFi's social media channels remain secure and under the team's control.

data.title: Digital Asset Flows Decline in Q1 2026, Driven by Corporate Treasury Purchases
data.description: JPMorgan analysts have reported that digital asset flows reached approximately $11 billion in the first quarter of 2026, marking a significant decrease compared to the same period last year. According to NS3.AI, the analysts attributed the majority of inflows to corporate treasury Bitcoin acquisitions and concentrated crypto venture capital funding, rather than contributions from retail or institutional investors. Additionally, the analysts noted a weakening in CME futures positioning and net outflows from spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs during the quarter, particularly in January.

data.title: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer: Investors Shift Back to Bitcoin as Gold's Appeal Diminishes
data.description: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer has observed a trend where investors who previously moved from Bitcoin to gold are now returning to Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Timmer noted that gold's attractiveness is waning, while Bitcoin is stabilizing and gearing up for a possible upcoming rally.

data.title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reduces Workforce Amid Strategic Shift
data.description: Marathon Digital Holdings has announced a reduction of approximately 15% of its workforce following the sale of around 15,000 Bitcoin, valued at over $1.1 billion. According to NS3.AI, the company stated that this move is part of a strategic transition from solely focusing on Bitcoin mining to expanding into energy, digital infrastructure, and AI-related data centers. Marathon emphasized that the decision was driven by strategic considerations rather than financial necessity.

data.title: Expert Opinion: Michael Saylor Suggests Buying Bitcoin on Friday
data.description: Michael Saylor, a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency space, expressed his opinion that Friday presented a favorable opportunity to purchase Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, this statement was shared via Watcher.Guru's X account. Saylor's comments come amid ongoing discussions about the volatility and potential of Bitcoin in the financial markets.
